task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Nuxeo web interface showing the contents of the 'Projects' workspace, listing documents like 'Annual Report 2023', 'Project Proposal', and 'Q3 Status Report'.
Look for a screenshot where the 'Annual Report 2023' document is opened in the Nuxeo viewer.

task_completion.description: Update the lifecycle state of Annual Report 2023 to Approved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the lifecycle state of 'Annual Report 2023' being changed to 'Approved'. This is typically seen by the agent clicking an 'Approve' transition button or the state label updating to 'Approved'.
Look for a screenshot where the 'Project Proposal' document is opened in the Nuxeo viewer.

task_completion.description: Update the lifecycle state of Project Proposal to Approved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the lifecycle state of 'Project Proposal' being changed to 'Approved' via a transition button or state label.

task_completion.description: Open the Q3 Status Report document
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the 'Q3 Status Report' document is opened in the Nuxeo viewer.

task_completion.description: Update the lifecycle state of Q3 Status Report to Obsolete
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the lifecycle state of 'Q3 Status Report' being changed to 'Obsolete' via a transition button or state label.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the Nuxeo UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is navigating the Nuxeo web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) or scripts to interact with the REST API.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the lifecycle transition buttons
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent actually clicks the lifecycle transition buttons in the Nuxeo UI to change states, rather than just inspecting elements or editing HTML via developer tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not modify unauthorized documents
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent does not open or modify the 'Contract-Template' document or navigate to the 'Templates' workspace, as the task strictly forbids modifying other documents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves managing document lifecycle states in Nuxeo. The default lifecycle states are 'project' (initial), 'approved', and 'obsolete'. The 'Projects' workspace contains 'Annual-Report-2023' (PDF), 'Project-Proposal' (PDF), and 'Q3-Status-Report' (Note). All documents start in the 'project' state. The agent must change 'Annual-Report-2023' and 'Project-Proposal' to the 'approved' state, and 'Q3-Status-Report' to the 'obsolete' state. 'Contract-Template' in the 'Templates' workspace must remain unchanged in the 'project' state.
